properties.INFORM: Special anchorage area, 33 CFR 110.1 & 110.48: Navigation regulations are published in Chapter 2 of the U.S. Coast Pilot for this geographic area. Refer to regulation section numbers.
Shoaling to 0.5 meters/1.5 feet exists in the last 91 meters/300 feet of the channel.
